LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer_ToggleDesc: Spread digestive acid from this organ into nearby valid cells. Turning it off makes the organ absorb acid back cell by cell.
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer_FuelInspect: External digestive fuel: {0} nutrition. Hemogel output: {1}/h.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainTendrilHauling_Inspect: Hauling tendrils: {0} active. Limit: {1} / {2}. Tendril upkeep: {3}/h.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainTendrilLimit_Tooltip: Sets how many hauling tendrils this colony brain may maintain. Lowering the limit makes excess tendrils drop carried loads and retract. Current upkeep: {2} hemogel per hour.
LanguageData.FB_ShowColonyTendrilCaptureZoneDesc: Show the automatic pickup zone used by colony hauling tendrils.
